summary: Pre-deployment stability testing COMPLETE. All critical flows verified working: Login, Contacts, Photos, Event Types, Activity Feed, Short URLs. The centralized event type architecture fix is confirmed working - Birthday, Thank You, Holiday, Welcome, Anniversary cards all display with correct labels (NOT falling back to 'Congrats Card Sent'). Photo gallery works with proper URL resolution and iOS safe area handling.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - endpoint may not exist or require different params

login.details: POST /api/auth/login with forest@imosapp.com / Admin123! returns 200 with user data

single_contact.details: GET /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_id} returns Forest Ward contact data

contact_photos_all.details: GET /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_id}/photos/all returns 11 photos with valid URLs

contact_events_timeline.details: GET /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_id}/events returns events with correct labels

short_url_create_birthday.details: POST /api/s/create with link_type=birthday_card correctly stores birthday_card

short_url_create_thank_you.details: POST /api/s/create with link_type=thank_you_card correctly stores thank_you_card

short_url_create_digital.details: POST /api/s/create with link_type=business_card correctly stores business_card

short_url_redirect.details: GET /api/s/{code} returns 302 redirect to original URL

frontend_login.details: Login page renders, credentials work, navigates to /home

frontend_home.details: Home page loads with Action Items and Recent Activity sections

frontend_contact_page.details: Contact page loads with Forest Ward profile, photo, and activity feed

frontend_photo_gallery.details: Gallery opens showing 11 Photos grid, X close button visible, 'BIRTHDAY - FOREST WARD' label correct

frontend_activity_tab.details: Activity tab shows all card types with correct labels: Birthday Card Sent, Thank You Card Sent, Holiday Card Sent, Welcome Card Sent, Anniversary Card Sent, Congrats Card Sent

event_type_labels_no_congrats_fallback.details: CRITICAL: Birthday, Thank You, Holiday, Welcome, Anniversary cards all show correct labels - NOT falling back to 'Congrats Card Sent'

seed_data_creation: Created test short URLs with link_types: birthday_card, thank_you_card, business_card, custom
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pre-deployment stability test completed. All core flows verified: 1) Login works, 2) Contacts load with photos, 3) Photo gallery opens with correct labels (BIRTHDAY not CONGRATS), 4) Activity tab shows ALL card types with correct labels (Birthday Card Sent, Thank You Card Sent, Holiday Card Sent, Welcome Card Sent, Anniversary Card Sent, Congrats Card Sent), 5) Short URLs correctly store link_type and redirect. The centralized event type architecture (backend utils/event_types.py + frontend utils/eventTypes.ts) is working correctly. No 'Congrats Card Sent' fallback bug observed.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - SMS sends are logged but not actually delivered

key_findings.event_type_fix_verified: The 'Congrats Card Sent' bug is FIXED. Activity feed correctly shows: Birthday Card Sent, Thank You Card Sent, Holiday Card Sent, Welcome Card Sent, Anniversary Card Sent, Congrats Card Sent (only for actual congrats cards)
key_findings.photo_gallery_fix_verified: Gallery opens with 11 Photos, X button visible (iOS safe area handled), thumbnails load correctly with proper labels like 'BIRTHDAY - FOREST WARD'
key_findings.backend_tests: 19/19 pre-deployment tests passed, 35/35 event type regression tests passed
